title: Philotheca spicata

intro: Philotheca spicata, also known as the Sweet Philotheca or Sweet Bells, is a shrub native to Australia, belonging to the Rutaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and fever, due to its sedative and antispasmodic properties. The bioactive constituents of Philotheca spicata include flavonoids, limonoids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its therapeutic benefits.
